Adds interests onboarding and a client-side recommended feed.

What:
- Adds `OnboardingInterestsScreen` to capture `users/{userId}.prefs.travelInterests`.
- Persists interests via `FirestoreService.saveUserInterests`.
- Adds a Recommended strip to `HomeScreen` that ranks events by tag intersection with user interests (client-side).
- Extends `Event` model to include `tagIds`.
- Adds `userProfileProvider` to stream user profile doc and converts it to a typed `UserProfile` model consumed by `HomeScreen`.

Files changed in this PR (high-level):
- mobile/lib/screens/onboarding_interests_screen.dart (new) — onboarding UI to choose interests.
- mobile/lib/services/firestore_service.dart — adds `saveUserInterests`.
- mobile/lib/models/event.dart — adds `tagIds`.
- mobile/lib/models/user_profile.dart (new) — typed `UserProfile` model.
- mobile/lib/providers/auth_provider.dart — `userProfileProvider` now streams `UserProfile?`.
- mobile/lib/screens/home_screen.dart — reads typed profile.travelInterests to compute client-side recommendations.

Why:
- Small, measurable engagement improvement. This is an MVP recommender that validates interest-driven recommendations without server-side infra.

Testing:
1. Run the app, sign in, open Home.
2. Tap Edit on Recommended and choose interests.
3. Confirm `users/{userId}.prefs.travelInterests` contains selected tags in Firestore.
4. Home feed Recommended strip orders events matching chosen tags higher.

Notes and Next Steps:
- Next: server-side cached recommendations for scale and more advanced scoring (move heavy work off-device).
- Follow-up: add lightweight unit/widget tests for `UserProfile.fromDoc` and Recommended strip rendering.

Commit references included in this PR: latest commit fbe8433
